chapters.title: Accelerating Quantum Computing: a descent to the floor
chapters.summary: How AI and robotics might shorten the road to a real quantum computer — a descent from surface tricks to the floor of the problem, with a simulation at the bottom.

chapters.title: AI Today, and Scoping Tomorrow’s Frontier
chapters.summary: AI has quietly become a co-author of quantum-computing research. This chapter puts that to the test on one hard problem — and shows AI doing something past re-deriving and discovering: scoping a frontier, and saying honestly where to stop.
